name: Nusantara Dark Mode QA
must_pass: Tema cycles Auto to Terang to Gelap
Dark mode background is warm, not pure black
Gold accents are visible but not too bright
Theme preference persists after page change
fix_rules: If text is too dim, lighten secondary text color
If gold is too bright, reduce accent saturation
If theme button overlaps content, move it lower or smaller
If Auto mode is confusing, default to Terang and let user choose Gelap
